description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Gibs Pasta Qeema Macaroni Recipe Pack, predominantly red with blue and gold accents. The front features a large, ornate label with the brand name, product type, and an appetizing image of cooked macaroni with minced meat and vegetables. The sides display nutritional information, product details, and certifications, while the back provides detailed boiling instructions, ingredients, and additional product information in both English and Urdu. The box is sealed and designed to stand upright, with a flat top and bottom, and is likely to contain both dry pasta and a recipe sachet inside. The packaging is visually vibrant, with a mix of text, graphics, and food imagery, making it eye-catching for consumers.
description: A vibrant, upright rectangular box of Gibs Pasta Qeema Macaroni Recipe Pack, featuring colorful branding, food imagery, and detailed product information on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label, brand logo, product name, and a large image of the prepared pasta dish, along with a '2 in 1 Recipe Mix Sachet Inside' badge.
description_view_1: The left side displays the brand logo, product name, and a detailed nutritional information table in a blue panel.
description_view_2: The back view features boiling instructions, ingredients, and additional product information in both English and Urdu, all set on a blue background with decorative food graphics.
description_view_3: The right side shows the brand logo, product name, a product description, and several certification logos at the bottom.
attribute_labeling: Front label with product name, food image, '2 in 1 Recipe Mix Sachet Inside' badge, nutritional information, boiling instructions, ingredients, certifications (Halal, ISO), and bilingual text in English and Urdu.
attribute_product_name: Gibs Pasta Qeema Macaroni Recipe Pack
